content: I knew Anil Chatterjee for over 30 years. He was a kind man. On the morning of 12/03/2017, I was at his house. He called me in to witness him sign a will leaving the land to Priya. I saw him sign it. I signed as a witness. I remember the day because it was a sunny Tuesday, and I had just finished my morning walk. I have no reason to lie. I was not in the hospital then. I don’t know why my diary says otherwise — I must have written it wrong. I am 72 years old. I cannot remember every date. But I know what I saw.
